settings.description: Configure automatic alerts for your site. Enabled alerts will generate notifications in the notification bell.

MORTALITE_ELEVEE.label: High mortality
MORTALITE_ELEVEE.description: Alert when mortality rate exceeds the defined threshold

QUALITE_EAU.label: Water quality
QUALITE_EAU.description: Alert when water quality parameters are out of range

STOCK_BAS.label: Low stock
STOCK_BAS.description: Alert when a product's stock falls below the alert threshold

RAPPEL_ALIMENTATION.label: Feeding reminder
RAPPEL_ALIMENTATION.description: Reminder when no feeding record has been made for N days

RAPPEL_BIOMETRIE.label: Biometry reminder
RAPPEL_BIOMETRIE.description: Reminder when no biometry has been performed for N days

PERSONNALISEE.label: Custom
PERSONNALISEE.description: Custom alert with a manually defined threshold

BESOIN_EN_RETARD.label: Overdue need
BESOIN_EN_RETARD.description: Alert when a need list exceeds its deadline without being processed

DENSITE_ELEVEE.label: High density
DENSITE_ELEVEE.description: Alert when biomass per m³ exceeds the threshold for the system type

RENOUVELLEMENT_EAU_INSUFFISANT.label: Insufficient water renewal
RENOUVELLEMENT_EAU_INSUFFISANT.description: Alert when the effective renewal rate is insufficient for current density

AUCUN_RELEVE_QUALITE_EAU.label: No water quality record
AUCUN_RELEVE_QUALITE_EAU.description: Alert when no water quality record has been registered for N days at high density

DENSITE_CRITIQUE_QUALITE_EAU.label: Critical density + degraded water quality
DENSITE_CRITIQUE_QUALITE_EAU.description: Combined alert: high density AND critical water quality simultaneously

ABONNEMENT_RAPPEL_RENOUVELLEMENT.label: Subscription renewal reminder
ABONNEMENT_RAPPEL_RENOUVELLEMENT.description: Automatic reminder when subscription expires in 14, 7, 3 or 1 day(s)

ABONNEMENT_ESSAI_EXPIRE.label: Free trial expired
ABONNEMENT_ESSAI_EXPIRE.description: Notification sent when a free trial is about to expire

MALES_STOCK_BAS.label: Insufficient breeding males
MALES_STOCK_BAS.description: Alert when the number of active males is insufficient for planned spawnings

FEMELLE_SUREXPLOITEE.label: Overworked female
FEMELLE_SUREXPLOITEE.description: Alert when a female is solicited too frequently (risk of exhaustion)

CONSANGUINITE_RISQUE.label: Inbreeding risk
CONSANGUINITE_RISQUE.description: Alert when estimated inbreeding coefficient between breeders exceeds threshold

INCUBATION_ECLOSION.label: Incubation/hatching monitoring
INCUBATION_ECLOSION.description: Alert during the incubation or hatching phase of an egg batch

TAUX_SURVIE_CRITIQUE_LOT.label: Critical survival rate (batch)
TAUX_SURVIE_CRITIQUE_LOT.description: Alert when a fingerling batch survival rate falls below critical threshold

MORTALITE_ELEVEE.label: High mortality
MORTALITE_ELEVEE.description: Alert when mortality rate exceeds defined threshold

QUALITE_EAU.label: Water quality
QUALITE_EAU.description: Alert when water quality parameters are out of range

STOCK_BAS.label: Low stock
STOCK_BAS.description: Alert when product stock drops below warning level

RAPPEL_ALIMENTATION.label: Feeding reminder
RAPPEL_ALIMENTATION.description: Reminder when no feeding record has been made for N days

RAPPEL_BIOMETRIE.label: Biometry reminder
RAPPEL_BIOMETRIE.description: Reminder when no biometry has been done for N days

PERSONNALISEE.label: Custom
PERSONNALISEE.description: Custom alert with manually defined threshold

BESOIN_EN_RETARD.label: Overdue need
BESOIN_EN_RETARD.description: Alert when a needs list exceeds its deadline without being processed

DENSITE_ELEVEE.label: High density
DENSITE_ELEVEE.description: Alert when biomass per m3 exceeds the threshold for the system type

RENOUVELLEMENT_EAU_INSUFFISANT.label: Insufficient water renewal
RENOUVELLEMENT_EAU_INSUFFISANT.description: Alert when the effective renewal rate is too low for the current density

AUCUN_RELEVE_QUALITE_EAU.label: No water quality record
AUCUN_RELEVE_QUALITE_EAU.description: Alert when no water quality record has been entered for N days at high density

DENSITE_CRITIQUE_QUALITE_EAU.label: Critical density + poor water quality
DENSITE_CRITIQUE_QUALITE_EAU.description: Combined alert: high density AND critical water quality simultaneously

ABONNEMENT_RAPPEL_RENOUVELLEMENT.label: Subscription renewal reminder
ABONNEMENT_RAPPEL_RENOUVELLEMENT.description: Automatic reminder when subscription expires in 14, 7, 3, or 1 day(s)

ABONNEMENT_ESSAI_EXPIRE.label: Free trial expired
ABONNEMENT_ESSAI_EXPIRE.description: Notification sent when a free trial is about to expire

MALES_STOCK_BAS.label: Insufficient male broodstock
MALES_STOCK_BAS.description: Alert when the number of active males is insufficient for planned spawnings

FEMELLE_SUREXPLOITEE.label: Overworked female
FEMELLE_SUREXPLOITEE.description: Alert when a female is used too frequently (risk of exhaustion)

CONSANGUINITE_RISQUE.label: Inbreeding risk
CONSANGUINITE_RISQUE.description: Alert when the estimated inbreeding rate between broodstock exceeds the threshold

INCUBATION_ECLOSION.label: Incubation/hatching monitoring
INCUBATION_ECLOSION.description: Alert during the incubation or hatching phase of an egg batch

TAUX_SURVIE_CRITIQUE_LOT.label: Critical survival rate (batch)
TAUX_SURVIE_CRITIQUE_LOT.description: Alert when the survival rate of a fingerling batch drops below the critical threshold
